regional_cost_note: Fencing in Rotorua typically costs $160–$300/m for timber paling, $210–$370/m for Colorsteel, and $320–$650/m for glass pool fencing. Rotorua rates are generally competitive — expect to pay near or slightly below the national average. Prices include posts, rails, labour, and removal of old fencing — confirm what's included in any quote.
